title: The Wheel of Sharp Weapons
description: A fierce mind-training text: every suffering you experience is the result of your own past actions. Turn the weapon of karma back on the ego.
introduction: A fierce mind-training text: every suffering you experience is the result of your own past actions. Turn the weapon of karma back on the ego.

translation.text: When everything goes wrong in our lives, the sharp weapon of karma is circling back. All the harm we have done to others returns to us. Therefore, from now on, let us take upon ourselves the suffering of all beings.
